entries.question: How do I track my order?
entries.answer: Track your order by logging into your ShopMax account and visiting 'My Orders'. Click on your order number to see real-time tracking. You'll also receive email updates at each shipping milestone.

entries.question: Can I modify my order after placing it?
entries.answer: Orders can be modified within 1 hour of placement. After that, orders enter our fulfillment process and cannot be changed. Visit 'My Orders' or contact our store for immediate assistance.

entries.question: How do I cancel my order?
entries.answer: Cancel your order from 'My Orders' by clicking 'Cancel Order'. Cancellations are possible before shipping (usually within 2 hours). For store orders, contact the store directly.

entries.question: What payment methods do you accept?
entries.answer: ShopMax accepts Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, ShopMax Gift Cards, and ShopMax Store Credit. Cash accepted in-store only.

entries.question: Can I use multiple payment methods?
entries.answer: Yes! You can split payment between a gift card and credit card. At checkout, apply your gift card first, then pay the remaining balance with another payment method.

entries.question: What is your return policy?
entries.answer: ShopMax accepts returns within 90 days of purchase with receipt. Items must be unused and in original packaging. Some exclusions apply to electronics (30 days) and clearance items (final sale).

entries.question: How do I return an online order?
entries.answer: For online returns, log into your account, go to 'My Orders', and click 'Return Items'. Print the prepaid return label and drop off at any carrier location. Returns are free!

entries.question: Can I return online purchases to a store?
entries.answer: Absolutely! Bring your online order and packing slip to any ShopMax store for an immediate refund or exchange. Store locator available on our website.

entries.question: How long do refunds take?
entries.answer: Refunds are processed within 3-5 business days after we receive your return. The refund will appear on your original payment method within 5-10 business days depending on your bank.

entries.question: What items cannot be returned?
entries.answer: Final sale items, intimate apparel, opened electronics, perishables, and personalized items cannot be returned. Check the product page for specific return eligibility.

entries.question: What are your shipping options?
entries.answer: ShopMax offers Standard (5-7 days), Express (2-3 days), and Next Day shipping. Orders over $49 ship free with Standard. Curbside pickup available at all stores within 2 hours.

entries.question: Do you offer free shipping?
entries.answer: Yes! Standard shipping is free on all orders over $49. ShopMax Rewards members get free shipping on all orders, no minimum. Sign up for free at checkout.

entries.question: What is curbside pickup?
entries.answer: Curbside pickup lets you order online and pick up at any ShopMax store. Most orders are ready within 2 hours. You'll receive a notification when your order is ready for pickup.

entries.question: Do you ship internationally?
entries.answer: Currently, ShopMax ships to all 50 US states, Puerto Rico, and US Virgin Islands. We do not ship internationally at this time.

entries.question: My package was delivered but I didn't receive it.
entries.answer: Check around your property, with neighbors, and your mailbox. Wait 24 hours as carriers sometimes mark delivered early. If still missing, contact us with your order number for a replacement or refund.

entries.question: How do I check product availability in stores?
entries.answer: Use our website or app to check real-time inventory at your local store. Select 'Check Store Availability' on any product page and enter your zip code.

entries.question: Do you price match?
entries.answer: Yes! ShopMax matches prices from major retailers within 14 days of purchase. Bring in the ad or show us online, and we'll match the price. Some exclusions apply.

entries.question: What is your product warranty?
entries.answer: All products include manufacturer warranty. Electronics: 1-2 years. Appliances: 1-5 years. Extended protection plans available for purchase at checkout.

entries.question: Do you restock sold out items?
entries.answer: Popular items are restocked regularly. Sign up for 'Back in Stock' notifications on the product page. Limited edition items may not be restocked.

entries.question: Are your products authentic?
entries.answer: ShopMax is an authorized retailer for all brands we carry. Every product is 100% authentic with full manufacturer warranty. We do not sell refurbished items unless clearly marked.

entries.question: How do ShopMax Rewards work?
entries.answer: Earn 1 point per $1 spent. 100 points = $1 reward. Members get free shipping, exclusive deals, and birthday bonuses. Points never expire with annual activity.

entries.question: Can I use a coupon code?
entries.answer: Enter promo codes at checkout in the 'Promo Code' field. Only one code per order. Codes cannot be combined with other offers unless specified.

entries.question: How do I check my gift card balance?
entries.answer: Check your gift card balance online at shopmax-retail.com/giftcards, in-store at any register, or by calling 1-800-SHOPMAX.

entries.question: Do you offer buy now pay later?
entries.answer: Yes! ShopMax partners with Affirm and Klarna for flexible payment options. Choose at checkout for orders $50+. Subject to credit approval.

entries.question: Is my payment information secure?
entries.answer: Absolutely. ShopMax uses 256-bit SSL encryption and is PCI DSS compliant. We never store your full credit card number. Your payment information is always safe.
